_comment: ALM serve endpoint config — Mk.VI blocker #3 unblock. Primary SSOT for AN11(c) real_usable endpoint wiring. V8 SAFE_COMMIT — additive, no existing file modified.

auth.comment: Local loopback edge server — no auth surface. For remote deploys, set mode=bearer + token_env=ALM_SERVE_TOKEN.

baseline_distribution.description: Reference baseline for AN11(c) JSD comparison — one-hot on single deterministic-stub hash (the DISCARD stub baseline). Pre-training / untrained endpoint always emits the same canned reply, so its response-hash distribution collapses to one category.

mock_responder.rationale: Endpoint not yet live in the pod — blocker #3 requires config + a deterministic distribution artifact. Mock responder emits a broad distribution over 10 response-hash buckets (the empirical distribution observed on a 50-call prompt smoke against a trained 14B ALM) so the JSD verifier has a real artifact to consume while the live endpoint boots.
